nasb.text: “A voice was heard in Ramah, Weeping and great mourning, Rachel weeping for her children; And she refused to be comforted, Because they were no more.”

esv.text: “A voice was heard in Ramah, weeping and loud lamentation, Rachel weeping for her children; she refused to be comforted, because they are no more.”

cnv.text: “在拉瑪聽見有聲音， 是痛哭、極大哀號的聲音； 拉結為她的兒女哀哭， 不肯受安慰，因為他們都不在了。”

ccb.text: “在拉玛有痛哭哀号的声音， 是拉结在为儿女哀痛， 不肯接受安慰， 因为他们都死了！”

csbs.text: “从拉玛听见了声音， 是哀哭    和极其伤痛的声音， 是瑞秋为她的儿女哀哭， 不肯接受安慰， 因为他们不在了。”
